title: Open Folder upload from + New menu on Drive
description: Verifies the user can open the Folder upload entry point from the Drive page sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Verify URL contains "/drive"
Click on "+ New" in the sidebar
Verify text "Folder upload" is visible
Click on "Folder upload"
Verify text "Select folder" is visible

title: Unsupported browser message shown for Folder upload
description: Verifies that when folder picking is not supported, the UI shows an explanatory message instead of failing silently.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click on "+ New" in the sidebar
Click on "Folder upload"
Verify text "Folder upload not supported on this browser" is visible
Verify element "Upload progress" is not visible

title: Restore a trashed file back to Drive
description: Verifies a user can restore a file from Trash and then see it back in the Drive list.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive/trash
Verify text "Trash" is visible
Verify element "Trashed files list" is visible
Click "Restore" on a trashed file
Verify text "Restore" is not visible
Click "Drive" in the left sidebar navigation
Verify URL contains "/drive"
Verify element "File list" is visible

title: Create a new folder from Drive dashboard
description: Verifies a user can create a new folder and see it appear in the folder list.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Verify page title contains "Drive"
Click on "Create" dropdown
Click on "New Folder"
Type "QA Folder A" into the folder name field in the modal dialog
Click on "Create" button in the modal dialog
Verify text "QA Folder A" is visible in the folder list

title: Navigate into an existing folder and verify breadcrumb
description: Verifies clicking a folder opens its contents view and shows a breadcrumb with the folder name.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Verify element "Files and folders list" is visible
Click on the first visible folder in the list
Verify URL contains "/drive/folder/"
Verify element "Breadcrumb navigation" is visible
Verify element "Folder contents list" is visible

title: Create nested folder structure by creating a folder inside a folder
description: Verifies a user can navigate into a folder and create a new folder within it.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click on the first visible folder in the list
Verify URL contains "/drive/folder/"
Click on "Create" dropdown
Click on "New Folder"
Type "Nested Folder 1" into the folder name field in the modal dialog
Click on "Create" button in the modal dialog
Verify text "Nested Folder 1" is visible in the folder contents list

title: New Folder modal validation when submitting an empty name
description: Verifies the modal shows a required-name validation message and stays open when submitted with an empty name.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click on "Create" dropdown
Click on "New Folder"
Click on "Create" button in the modal dialog
Verify text "Folder name required" is visible
Verify element "New Folder modal dialog" is visible

title: Cancel new folder creation closes the modal without creating a folder
description: Verifies closing the New Folder modal does not create a folder and the dialog is dismissed.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click on "Create" dropdown
Click on "New Folder"
Verify element "New Folder modal dialog" is visible
Click on "Cancel" button in the modal dialog
Verify element "New Folder modal dialog" is not visible
Verify text "QA Folder Cancel Test" is not visible in the folder list

title: New Folder modal can be dismissed with Escape key
description: Verifies the modal closes when the user presses Escape.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click on "Create" dropdown
Click on "New Folder"
Verify element "New Folder modal dialog" is visible
Press "Escape" key
Verify element "New Folder modal dialog" is not visible

title: Open full-page preview from the preview modal
description: Verifies that 'Open full preview' transitions from the modal to the full-page preview view.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Verify element "File list or file grid" is visible
Click on a file card that supports preview (image or PDF)
Verify element "Preview modal" is visible
Click on "Open full preview"
Verify URL contains "/preview/"
Verify element "Full-page preview" is visible

title: Public share page shows an error state for an invalid token
description: Verifies that opening a share link with an invalid token shows a visible error or not-found message instead of a file view.

steps.description: Navigate to /share/invalid-token
Verify URL contains "/share/"
Verify text "Not found" is visible

title: Filter files and folders from the Drive top-bar search updates results in real time
description: Verifies that typing into the search input filters visible items in the current Drive scope without needing to submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Verify element "search input in top bar" is visible
Click search input in top bar
Type "a" into "search input in top bar"
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible
Type "ab" into "search input in top bar"
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible

title: Search with no matches shows the "No results for \"<query>\"" empty state
description: Verifies that a query with no matches displays the explicit no-results message including the query text.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click search input in top bar
Type "zzzz-no-match-123" into "search input in top bar"
Verify text "No results for \"zzzz-no-match-123\"" is visible
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible

title: Clearing the search input restores the unfiltered results list
description: Verifies that removing the search query returns the Drive view to its default unfiltered state.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click search input in top bar
Type "test" into "search input in top bar"
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible
Press "Backspace" key
Press "Backspace" key
Press "Backspace" key
Press "Backspace" key

title: Search handles leading/trailing spaces in the query without breaking results UI
description: Verifies that entering a query with extra spaces does not break the results view and still shows either matches or a proper no-results state.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click search input in top bar
Type "   sample   " into "search input in top bar"
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible
Verify element "search input in top bar" is visible

title: Search accepts special characters and displays no-results message when nothing matches
description: Verifies that special characters can be typed into search and the UI shows the correct no-results empty state when appropriate.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click search input in top bar
Type "@@@###$$$" into "search input in top bar"
Verify text "No results for \"@@@###$$$\"" is visible
Verify element "search input in top bar" is visible

title: Search continues to work after losing and regaining focus on the search input
description: Verifies that the user can click away and return to the search input without the query disappearing unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /drive
Click search input in top bar
Type "focuscheck" into "search input in top bar"
Verify element "files and folders results list" is visible
Click on "files and folders results list"
Click search input in top bar
Verify element "search input in top bar" is visible
